evidence: Repository-owner approval recorded in conductor/DECISION_LOG.md on 2026-07-19; exact candidate and calibration rows in data/derived/vertical_slice/crosswalk_review_queue.jsonl and mapping_calibration_cases.jsonl.
rationale: Approve the reviewed benchmark outcome as a related genomic-test comparison while retaining the restriction that it is not an exact billing equivalence or policy estimate.
scope_equivalence: Related comparison only; scope and jurisdiction are not equivalent.
unit_equivalence: No billing-unit equivalence is asserted; compare only as a reviewed mapping relation.
restrictions: Do not use as billing, clinical, legal or policy equivalence without separate evidence and research review.
